import React, { useState } from 'react'; import './doctor.css'; const Doctors = () => { const [doctors, setDoctors] = useState([ { id: "DOC-01", name: "Dr. James Smith", spec: "Cardiology", status: "On-Duty", patients: 12 }, { id: "DOC-02", name: "Dr. Helena Adams", spec: "Neurology", status: "On-Leave", patients: 0 }, { id: "DOC-03", name: "Dr. Robert Taylor", spec: "Pediatrics", status: "On-Duty", patients: 8 }, ]); return (

Doctor Directory

View medical specialists and current availability.

{doctors.map((doc) => ( ))}
Doctor Specialization Active Patients Status Schedule
{doc.name.charAt(4)}
{doc.name} 		{doc.spec} {doc.patients} Patients {doc.status}
); }; export default Doctors;
